revision.comment: Rv. Breaks pages with no "header=" parameter.
revision.text:
{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{| style="width:{{{width|100%}}}" |- |
{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Rv. Adding width option seems to change it from transparent to white.
revision.text:
{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: converting to Navbox collapsible so initial collapsed state may be specified
revision.text:
{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/David Kernow|David Kernow]] ([[User talk:David Kernow|talk]]) to last version by Stemonitis
revision.text:
{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Changed default text-alignment to "left", for readability's sake. (If you must, you can set the "ta1=" value to "center" on your article's pages.)
revision.text:
{{{header|}}} 
[[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Increase the number of NavFrame divs so it starts out hidden (cf. [[Template:Hidden]]) and have only one copy of the border
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Undo revision 103680844 by [[Special:Contributions/Kaustuv|Kaustuv]] ([[User talk:Kaustuv|talk]]) breaks too many things -- starting a fork
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Wikipedia special effects templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: add capability to control collapse state, default to autocollapse, parameter is "state"
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''state'' || State of the collapse: collapsed or expanded or autocollapse
autocollapse will collapse if 2 or more collapseable are used || autocollapse | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''state'' || State of the collapse: collapsed or expanded or autocollapse
autocollapse will collapse if 2 or more collapseable are used || autocollapse | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: try copying state to NavHead as well
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''state'' || State of the collapse: collapsed or expanded or autocollapse
autocollapse will collapse if 2 or more collapseable are used || autocollapse | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

autocollapse will collapse if 2 or more collapseable are used || autocollapse | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

autocollapse will collapse if 2 or more collapseable are used || autocollapse | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''state'' || State of the collapse: collapsed or expanded or autocollapse
autocollapse will collapse if 2 or more collapseable are used || autocollapse | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: rv to david (you are trying to mix NavFrame and collapsible table scripting, if it isn't broken now it likely will break in the future)
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''header'' || (or ''title'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
===Parameters=== {| class="wikitable" ! Parameter !! Description !! Default | ''border'' || Border width and type (style="border:{{{border|}}};") || none | ''bg1'' || Titlebar background color || transparent | ''ta1'' || Titlebar text-alignment || left | ''extra1'' || Any extra styles to apply to titlebar || (nothing) | ''title'' || (or ''header'') Title shown on titlebar || (nothing) | ''bg2'' || Body background color || transparent | ''ta2'' || Body text-alignment || left | ''extra2'' || Any extra styles to apply to body || (nothing) |} [[Category:Formatting templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Cleaning up {{[[Template:documnetation|documentation]]}} etc usage. Learn more at [[WP:DOC]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{toggle|}}} |left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation, template|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}} {{documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{{toggle|}}}|left | ---------------------------------------------------------------- toggle=left, so format [hide/show] link on lefthand side: ---------------------------------------------------------------- -->
  {{{header|}}} -->{{{title|}}}
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
{{documentation|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}}

{{#ifeq:{{{toggle|}}} |left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation, template|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}} {{documentation}}

  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
| ------------------------------------------------------------- toggle/=left, so format [hide/show] link on righthand side: ------------------------------------------------------------- -->
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{documentation|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}}

revision.comment: Protected Template:Hidden begin: Very high-risk template. [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{toggle|}}}|left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{documentation|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}}

{{#ifeq:{{{show-hide|}}}|left |
style="position:relative; width:100%; border:{{{border|none}}};">
style="position:absolute; width:3.4em; background:transparent;">
{{{title|}}}
style="display:none; background:{{{bodybackground|transparent}}}; text-align:{{{bodyalign|left}}}; {{{bodystyle|}}}">|
style="border:{{{border|none}}};">
style="background:{{{titlebackground|transparent}}}; text-align:{{{titlealign|left}}}; {{{titlestyle|}}}">{{{title|}}}
style="display:none; background:{{{bodybackground|transparent}}}; text-align:{{{bodyalign|left}}}; {{{bodystyle|}}}">}} {{pp-template|small=yes}} {{documentation|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}}

{{#ifeq:{{{toggle|}}}|left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{documentation|Template:Hidden begin-end/doc}}

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Hidden begin: reducing to template editing per request on [[WP:RFPP]] ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only administrators] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{toggle|}}}|left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Per [[Template talk:Hidden begin#Protected edit request on 13 June 2014]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}} {{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: marked "toggle" as deprecated, CSS style order
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Amended width/padding-left so that left-aligned "[show]" within background
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
background:transparent;">
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
background:transparent;">
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Added style parameter per talkpage suggestion
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
;background:transparent;">
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: "contentstyle" as less potentially ambiguous alternative to "bodystyle"
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
;background:transparent;">
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

;background:transparent;">

revision.comment: sync the toggle=left and toggle=right versions
revision.text:
{{hatnote|Templates {{noredirect|Template:Begin hidden|Begin hidden}}, {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden|Start hidden}} and {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden section|Start hidden section}} redirect here.}}{{#ifeq:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}|left |
;background:transparent;">
  {{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
|
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}} 
}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: update to use mw-collapsible per request on the talk page
revision.text:
{{hatnote|Templates {{noredirect|Template:Begin hidden|Begin hidden}}, {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden|Start hidden}} and {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden section|Start hidden section}} redirect here.}}
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
{{Documentation}}

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
{{hatnote|Templates {{noredirect|Template:Begin hidden|Begin hidden}}, {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden|Start hidden}} and {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden section|Start hidden section}} redirect here.}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: added in a width parameter because sometimes images on the right or the left can hide part of the display. This is particularly a problem if the show button end up behind an image
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
{{hatnote|Templates {{noredirect|Template:Begin hidden|Begin hidden}}, {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden|Start hidden}} and {{noredirect|Template:Start hidden section|Start hidden section}} redirect here.}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: people who put hatnotes in template pages smh
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Track depreciated parameters so that I can update the template
revision.text:
{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
{{#if:{{{showhide|}}}{{{toggle|}}}{{{extra1|}}}{{{extra2|}}}|[[Category:Hidden begin with depreciated parameters]]}} {{Documentation}}

{{{header|}}}{{{title|}}}
{{#if:{{{bg1|}}}{{{bg2|}}}{{{headercss|}}}{{{contentcss|}}}{{{extra1|}}}{{{extra2|}}}|[[Category:Hidden begin with depreciated parameters]]}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Revert if there are errors | Use templatestyles & add bgcolor, titlebgcolor, contentbgcolor & remove support for bg1, bg2, headercss, contentcss, extra1, extra2.
revision.text:
'''{{{title|{{{header|}}}}}}'''
{{#if:{{{bg1|}}}{{{bg2|}}}{{{headercss|}}}{{{contentcss|}}}{{{extra1|}}}{{{extra2|}}}|[[Category:Hidden begin with depreciated parameters]]}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Stop apostrophe from appearing by moving to css
revision.text:
{{{title|{{{header|}}}}}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
